title: rubus × dobrensis
intro: Rubus × dobrensis, also known as the Himalayan blackberry or Himalayan raspberry, is a hybrid plant species within the Rubus genus, resulting from the cross between Rubus fruticosus and Rubus bifrons. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus × dobrensis include its ability to help manage various health issues such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to help reduce blood sugar levels and lower cholesterol. Rubus × dobrensis can be prepared as a tea, juice, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made from its leaves, fruits, and roots.
